zh.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy於1535年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福。她於大約1559年與Alexander Tredwell在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年7月16日在她的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy于1535年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福。她于大约1559年与Alexander Tredwell在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年7月16日在她的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福。

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy was born in 1535, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Alexander Tredwell about 1559, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 16 July 1603, in her hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy est née en 1535, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Alexander Tredwell environ 1559, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 juillet 1603, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy wurde 1535 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1559 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alexander Tredwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Juli 1603 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy è nata il nel 1535 nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Alexander Tredwell circa 1559, nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 luglio 1603, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroyは1535年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフで生まれた。約1559年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフでAlexander Tredwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年7月16日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy(은)는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1559년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 Alexander Tredwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 7월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy nasceu em 1535, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Alexander Tredwell aproximadamente 1559, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de julho de 1603, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy родилась в 1535 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Tredwell около 1559 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 июля 1603 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy nació en 1535, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Alexander Tredwell aproximadamente 1559, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de julio de 1603, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
